title: Aathmaann | Episode 24 | ஆத்மான் | psychological thriller Web Series | Thanthi One | 17th Mar 2026
description:
ஆத்மான் - தினமும் இரவு 8:30 மணிக்கு உங்கள் Thanthi One தொலைக்காட்சி மற்றும் Youtube சேலில் காணத்தவறாதீர்கள்.

Yaazhini is thrown into panic when Revathi suddenly goes missing, only to learn that Mathan has taken her to a mysterious location. Their journey sparks a twisted game of hide and seek, culminating in a confrontation with the powerful Athipathy family and shocking truths. In a dramatic clash, Mathan battles Atharvan to protect his loved ones, as news reports reveal that two bodies were recovered from the crime scene.
